subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have enjoined upon them that believe the Most Great Trust, whereto beareth witness the Lord of all beings in this station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا وصینا الذین آمنوا بالامانه الکبری یشهد بذلک مالک الوری فی هذا المقام
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
